reasoning: The candidate has 15+ years of experience in software engineering (since 2009), meeting the minimum 15-year requirement.

response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum experience and technical requirements but falls short on core AI/ML expertise and innovation, which are critical for this role. While they have relevant infrastructure experience (AI-agent tooling, cloud), they lack demonstrated AI products, research, or deep specialization. The entrepreneurial experience is limited to open-source projects, not within larger organizations.
